mapper.sql: select c.chapter_id, c.project_id, c.parent_id, c.chapter_number, c.title, c.summary, c.word_count, c.status, c.sort_order, c.version_no, c.del_flag, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, cc.content from novel_chapter c left join novel_chapter_content cc on c.chapter_id = cc.chapter_id
mapper.select: select max(chapter_number) from novel_chapter where project_id = #{projectId} and del_flag = '0'
select count(1) from novel_chapter where project_id = #{projectId} and del_flag = '0'
select ifnull(sum(word_count), 0) from novel_chapter where project_id = #{projectId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into novel_chapter ( project_id, parent_id, chapter_number, title, summary, word_count, status, sort_order, version_no, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{projectId}, #{parentId}, #{chapterNumber}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{wordCount}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, #{versionNo}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update: update novel_chapter set del_flag = '2' where chapter_id = #{chapterId}

update novel_chapter set del_flag = '2' where chapter_id in
#{chapterId}
update novel_chapter_content set content = #{content} where chapter_id = #{chapterId}
mapper.delete:
delete from novel_chapter_content where chapter_id in
#{chapterId}
mapper.insert: insert into novel_chapter_version (chapter_id, version_no, title, content, summary, change_log, create_by, create_time) values (#{chapterId}, #{versionNo}, #{title}, #{content}, #{summary}, 'auto save', #{updateBy}, sysdate())
